title: Strong economic data boosts sentiment
summary:
Main
Optimism about stronger demand from China boosted sentiment across the complex. This was aided by supply side issues, predominately centred around geopolitical risks. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: imgΣτιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-04-03 125241.png | assets/2024-04-03_strong-economic-data-boosts-sentiment_img_imgcea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84c_deb1bbe9b89b.png
Market Commentary
Crude oil prices rallied amid heightened geopolitical risks and signs of strong demand .
